Course closed for this cycle: Biological Sciences (Reproduction and Embryogenesis) by advanced study is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
Sep. 3, 2025
Application deadline
Apr. 29, 2026
These deadlines apply to applications for courses starting in Michaelmas 2026, Lent 2027 and Easter 2027.
matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Biological Sciences (Reproduction and Embryogenesis) by advanced study is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: The MPhil in Biological Sciences provides students with an opportunity to undertake a period of study and research in Reproduction and Embryogenesis, one of the Faculty’s key research pathways.
